name: Rhynne Table Lamp - 22.5 Inch Height - TBL4496 - Black - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Rhynne 22.5 inch black ceramic table lamp. This elegant lamp adds a touch of sophistication to any room with its sleek black finish and smooth ceramic texture. The Rhynne lamp stands as a statement piece, perfectly blending style and function. With its modern design, it fits seamlessly into various decor themes, providing the perfect accent for your living room or bedroom. The lamp's sturdy ceramic base ensures stability while the soft light creates an inviting atmosphere. Upgrade your decor with the understated charm of the Rhynne table lamp and enjoy the timeless elegance it brings to your space.
